name: Cloudflare WAF list IP ranges
watched_section: Any of these formats can exist in the same custom list with IP addresses
reminders: Re-check whether Cloudflare still documents mixed exact IP addresses and CIDR ranges in the same IP list.
Re-check the documented IPv4 CIDR bounds, currently /8 through /32.
Re-check the documented IPv6 CIDR bounds, currently /12 through /128.
Re-check whether exact IPv6 addresses remain supported, because that affects the live /64 versus /128 default discussion.
